title_en: Sourdough vs. Commercial Bread: What's in Your Sandwich?
title_es: Sourdough vs. Pan Comercial: ¿Qué Hay en Tu Sándwich?
hook_en: Did you know your bread could contain yoga mat chemicals?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que tu pan podría tener químicos de yoga?
key_message: Whole wheat sourdough bread is a simpler, healthier choice compared to commercial white bread, which contains questionable additives like azodicarbonamide.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of whole wheat sourdough and commercial white bread
Close-up of sourdough ingredients: flour, water, salt, starter
Zoom in on commercial bread ingredients list with azodicarbonamide highlighted
Quick clip of a yoga mat with azodicarbonamide text overlay
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Whole wheat sourdough bread (flour, water, salt, starter) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial white bread (20+ ingredients including azodicarbonamide) — Azodicarbonamide — used in bread AND yoga mats — is banned in the EU

title_en: Bread Battle: Simple Sourdough vs. Overloaded White
title_es: Batalla de Pan: Sourdough Simple vs. Blanco Sobrecargado
hook_en: Which bread do you think is healthier?
hook_es: ¿Cuál pan crees que es más saludable?
key_message: Whole wheat sourdough offers basic nutrition, while commercial white bread is packed with over 20 ingredients, including some banned in other countries.
visual_elements: Visual of two loaves: sourdough vs. commercial white bread
Shot of a hand holding a sourdough slice with ingredient overlay
Hand holding a white bread slice with a long ingredient list overlay
Text overlay highlighting 'banned in EU' for azodicarbonamide
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Whole wheat sourdough bread (flour, water, salt, starter) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial white bread (20+ ingredients including azodicarbonamide) — Azodicarbonamide — used in bread AND yoga mats — is banned in the EU
